nasb.text: And in the same way he sprinkled both the tabernacle and all the vessels of the ministry with the blood.

esv.text: And in the same way he sprinkled with the blood both the tent and all the vessels used in worship.

cnv.text: 他照樣把血灑在會幕和各樣應用的器皿上。

ccb.text: 他又照样把血洒在圣幕和所有用来献祭的器具上。

csbs.text: 然后，他又同样地把血洒在会幕和服事用的所有器皿上。
